rows.original: An invalid request was made to the server. Please report this on the CoC2 bug reports forum.
rows.raw: 'An invalid request was made to the server. Please report this on the CoC2 bug reports forum.'

rows.original: You are not signed into a fenoxo.com account. Cloud saving will not work.
rows.raw: "You are not signed into a fenoxo.com account. Cloud saving will not work."

rows.original: Your account doesn't have cloud save access. Cloud saving is available to Patreon backers.
rows.raw: "Your account doesn't have cloud save access. Cloud saving is available to Patreon backers."

rows.original: The cloud save server is reachable, but there was an unknown error.
rows.translation: 云保存服务器是可以连接的，但出现了一个未知错误。
rows.raw: "The cloud save server is reachable, but there was an unknown error."

rows.original: The cloud save server could not be reached. You can still play the game as normal, but cloud saving will not work.
rows.translation: 无法连接到云保存服务器。您仍然可以正常玩游戏，但云保存功能将无法使用。
rows.raw: "The cloud save server could not be reached. You can still play the game as normal, but cloud saving will not work."

rows.original: An invalid request was made to the server. Please report this on the CoC2 bug reports forum.

rows.raw: "You are not signed into a fenoxo.com account. Cloud saving will not work."

rows.raw: "Your account doesn't have cloud save access. Cloud saving is available to Patreon backers."

rows.original: The cloud save server is reachable, but there was an unknown error.
rows.translation: 云保存服务器是可以连接的，但出现了未知错误。
rows.raw: "The cloud save server is reachable, but there was an unknown error."

rows.original: The cloud save server could not be reached. You can still play the game as normal, but cloud saving will not work.
rows.translation: 无法连接到云保存服务器。您仍然可以正常玩游戏，但云保存功能将无法使用。
rows.raw: "The cloud save server could not be reached. You can still play the game as normal, but cloud saving will not work."

rows.translation: 在这里写下任何备注吧。

rows.original: , ARE YOU PLAYING THE RIGHT BUILD?
rows.translation: 你使用的是正确的配置吗？
rows.raw: ", ARE YOU PLAYING THE RIGHT BUILD?"

rows.original: ERROR: SAVE CORRUPTED | CLICK TO HELP
This save is corrupted and cannot be loaded. This could be due to save editing or a bug. If you think it is a bug please download the save by clicking the button below, and then uploading the save to

rows.original: Show all items that the shopkeeper offers.
rows.translation: 展示店主提供的所有商品。
rows.raw: "Show all items that the shopkeeper offers."

rows.original: Show only equippable items that the shopkeeper offers.
rows.translation: 仅显示店主出售的可装备物品。
rows.raw: "Show only equippable items that the shopkeeper offers."

rows.original: Show only items that can be consumed either in or out of combat that the shopkeeper offers.
rows.translation: 仅显示店主出售的那些可以在战斗中或战斗外使用的物品。
rows.raw: "Show only items that can be consumed either in or out of combat that the shopkeeper offers."

rows.original: Show only items that can react alchemically that the shopkeeper offers.
rows.raw: "Show only items that can react alchemically that the shopkeeper offers."

rows.original: Show only items that are not equippable, consumable, or able to used in alchemy that the shopkeeper offers.
rows.translation: 仅显示店主出售的那些既不能装备、也不能消耗，且不能用于炼金术的物品。
rows.raw: "Show only items that are not equippable, consumable, or able to used in alchemy that the shopkeeper offers."

rows.original: You are attempting to sell unique items with the unique item sell confirmation option enabled. Press the [Checkout] button once more to confirm the sale of the following unique items:
rows.raw: "You are attempting to sell unique items with the unique item sell confirmation option enabled. Press the [Checkout] button once more to confirm the sale of the following unique items:\n"

rows.translation: 角色选项是针对特定保存文件而设置的。

rows.original: For players that just want to experience CoC2's story. Reduces enemy damage by 60% and increases your party's damage by 60%.
rows.translation: 对于那些只想体验《CoC2》故事线的玩家来说，这个选项可以将敌人造成的伤害减少60%，同时使你的队伍造成的伤害增加60%。
rows.raw: "For players that just want to experience CoC2's story. Reduces enemy damage by 60% and increases your party's damage by 60%."

rows.original: For players who want to enjoy the game but not worry about losing. Reduces enemy damage by 25% and increases your party's damage by 25%.
rows.translation: 对于那些想要享受游戏乐趣却又担心会输的玩家来说，这个功能可以有效地降低敌人造成的伤害25%，同时增加你们队伍造成的伤害25%。
rows.raw: "For players who want to enjoy the game but not worry about losing. Reduces enemy damage by 25% and increases your party's damage by 25%."

rows.original: The game's default difficulty. You'll need a party of companions and some strategy to win. But defeat isn't always the end...
rows.translation: 这是游戏的默认难度。你需要一组同伴，并运用一些策略才能获胜。不过，失败并不总是意味着终结……
rows.raw: "The game's default difficulty. You'll need a party of companions and some strategy to win. But defeat isn't always the end..."

rows.original: The world of Savarra is grim and perilous indeed. Enemy damage is increased by 20%, and the party's damage is reduced by 15%.
rows.translation: 萨瓦拉的世界确实充满了残酷与危险。敌人的攻击伤害会增加20%，而玩家队伍造成的伤害则会减少15%。
rows.raw: "The world of Savarra is grim and perilous indeed. Enemy damage is increased by 20%, and the party's damage is reduced by 15%."

rows.original: Enables variations that may be stupid, over-the-top, or immersion breaking.
rows.translation: 允许出现一些可能显得愚蠢、夸张或会破坏沉浸感的设定或表现方式。
rows.raw: "Enables variations that may be stupid, over-the-top, or immersion breaking."

rows.original: In scenes that can use either hole, you will take it in the bum. If an NPC gets to pick what happens to you, they will prefer your bum if such an option exists.
rows.translation: 在那些可以使用任意一个洞口的场景中，你将会从屁股那里进入。如果有一个NPC可以决定你会遭遇什么，那么当有这样的选择时，他们肯定会选择让你的屁股进入洞口。
rows.raw: "In scenes that can use either hole, you will take it in the bum. If an NPC gets to pick what happens to you, they will prefer your bum if such an option exists."

rows.original: Makes the progression rate for all pregnancies and hatchings 6 times faster.
rows.translation: 使所有怀孕和孵化的进程速度提高6倍。
rows.raw: "Makes the progression rate for all pregnancies and hatchings 6 times faster."

rows.original: A preferred gender will override the default calculated gender. Certain tranformations or effects may lock the character to a specific gender.
rows.translation: 优先选择的性别会覆盖系统默认计算出的性别。某些转换或效果可能会使角色固定为特定的性别。
rows.raw: "A preferred gender will override the default calculated gender. Certain tranformations or effects may lock the character to a specific gender."

rows.original: Enables autosaving every 5 minutes of real time. Autosaves are triggered when control is returned to the player to move around the map.
rows.translation: 允许每5分钟自动保存一次游戏进度。当玩家重新获得控制权、开始在地图上移动时，系统会自动触发保存操作。
rows.raw: "Enables autosaving every 5 minutes of real time. Autosaves are triggered when control is returned to the player to move around the map."

rows.original: A custom icon for the player character can be uploaded. The image must be a PNG and must be less than 500 kilobytes. If the image isn't square it will be stretched to fit.
rows.translation: 可以上传玩家角色的自定义图标。该图像必须是PNG格式，且文件大小不得超过500千字节。如果图像不是正方形的，系统会将其缩放以使其适应显示需求。
rows.raw: "A custom icon for the player character can be uploaded. The image must be a PNG and must be less than 500 kilobytes. If the image isn't square it will be stretched to fit."

rows.original: For characters with two cocks: in scenes that don't use a specific cock, this sets which cock is the default and which the game uses as secondary.
rows.translation: 对于具有两个生殖器的角色来说：在那些没有明确指定使用哪个生殖器的场景中，这个设置会决定哪个生殖器是默认使用的，哪个则会被游戏视为备用选项。
rows.raw: "For characters with two cocks: in scenes that don't use a specific cock, this sets which cock is the default and which the game uses as secondary."

rows.original: Toggles Holiday events. OFF disables them entirely; AUTO makes them play only in-season; ON making them always added to the list of possible procs.
rows.raw: "Toggles Holiday events. OFF disables them entirely; AUTO makes them play only in-season; ON making them always added to the list of possible procs."

rows.original: Toggles miscellaneous dream events. OFF disables miscellaneous dreams entirely; ON makes them available to the list of possible procs.
rows.raw: "Toggles miscellaneous dream events. OFF disables miscellaneous dreams entirely; ON makes them available to the list of possible procs."

rows.original: System options are shared between saves.
rows.translation: 系统设置会在不同的游戏存档之间保持同步。
无法更改全屏显示设置。

rows.original: Makes a few of the more complex UIs easier to interact with via screen-reader.
rows.translation: 这使得一些较为复杂的用户界面通过屏幕阅读器来使用时变得更加容易操作。
rows.raw: "Makes a few of the more complex UIs easier to interact with via screen-reader."

rows.original: Allows use of a controller to play the game.
rows.translation: 允许使用控制器来玩游戏。
rows.raw: "Allows use of a controller to play the game."

rows.original: Set the mode for error reporting. AUTO will send error reports as they are generated. PROMPT requires user input on the error screen to send the error report.
rows.translation: 设置错误报告的模式。AUTO模式会在错误生成时立即发送报告；PROMPT模式则需要在错误屏幕上用户手动输入指令后才能发送报告。
rows.raw: "Set the mode for error reporting. AUTO will send error reports as they are generated. PROMPT requires user input on the error screen to send the error report."

rows.original: Use the default cursors instead of the game's stylized cursors.
rows.translation: 使用默认的光标，而不是游戏中自定义设计的光标。
rows.raw: "Use the default cursors instead of the game's stylized cursors."

rows.original: Choose which font you'll use: the game's stylized font, the default font, or a Dyslexia-friendly Font.
rows.translation: 请选择您要使用的字体：游戏的专用字体、默认字体，还是适合阅读障碍患者的字体。
rows.raw: "Choose which font you'll use: the game's stylized font, the default font, or a Dyslexia-friendly Font."

rows.translation: 适合阅读障碍患者使用

rows.original: Set the size of the main text.
rows.raw: "Set the size of the main text."

rows.original: Sample Text. Sample Text. Sample Text.
rows.translation: 示例文本。示例文本。示例文本。

rows.original: Show hot key indicators on the main action buttons.
rows.translation: 在主要的操作按钮上显示热键提示图标。
rows.raw: "Show hot key indicators on the main action buttons."

rows.original: Set the brightness of the game.
Images can be turned off if you prefer to use your imagination. Disables bust window, combat busts, and CGs.
rows.translation: 如果您更喜欢发挥自己的想象力，也可以选择关闭这些图像效果。这样就可以关闭角色头像窗口、战斗中的角色头像以及CG动画了。
rows.raw: "Images can be turned off if you prefer to use your imagination. Disables bust window, combat busts, and CGs."

rows.translation: 文本内使用的图像（电脑生成的图片）

rows.original: In-text images can be turned off if you prefer. If Images are disabled above, this setting is also disabled.
rows.translation: 如果您愿意，可以关闭文本中的图片。如果上面已经禁用了图片显示，那么这个设置也会被同时禁用。
rows.raw: "In-text images can be turned off if you prefer. If Images are disabled above, this setting is also disabled."

rows.original: Shows time in an ordinary digital format instead of the stylized dial.
rows.translation: 以普通的数字格式显示时间，而不是采用那种风格化的指针盘设计。
rows.raw: "Shows time in an ordinary digital format instead of the stylized dial."

rows.original: Summarizes the text of powers and attacks during combat. Can make combat simpler to follow. May lower performance during combat.
rows.translation: 总结了战斗中各种技能与攻击方式的运作机制，使战斗过程更易于理解。不过，这种方式可能会在一定程度上降低战斗中的实际表现。
rows.raw: "Summarizes the text of powers and attacks during combat. Can make combat simpler to follow. May lower performance during combat."

rows.original: Requires a button press after each combatant's turn in combat. Can make combat easier to follow.
rows.translation: 在每名战斗角色的回合结束后，都需要按下相应的按钮。这样可以让战斗过程更易于理解。
rows.raw: "Requires a button press after each combatant's turn in combat. Can make combat easier to follow."

rows.original: Choose whether you control only the PC (Player), the entire party (Manual), or allow the AI to control the entire party (Auto). Can be changed mid-battle.
rows.translation: 你可以选择是仅控制自己操作的玩家角色，还是控制整个队伍（手动模式），或者让人工智能来控制整个队伍（自动模式）。在战斗过程中也可以随时进行切换。
rows.raw: "Choose whether you control only the PC (Player), the entire party (Manual), or allow the AI to control the entire party (Auto). Can be changed mid-battle."

rows.original: Prompts the player for confirmation when trying to drop or sell unique items.
rows.translation: 在尝试丢弃或出售独特物品时，系统会提示玩家进行确认。
rows.raw: "Prompts the player for confirmation when trying to drop or sell unique items."

rows.original: Shows alert icon whenever new information or powers are added to the journal.
rows.translation: 每当有新信息或新能力被添加到日志中时，系统都会显示警告图标。
rows.raw: "Shows alert icon whenever new information or powers are added to the journal."

rows.original: Whether new characters should have autosave enabled by default or not. Can be disabled if you don't want to accidentally lose you main character's autosaves.
rows.translation: 新角色是否应该默认开启自动保存功能？如果你不希望自己的主要角色保存的数据意外丢失，也可以选择关闭这一功能。
rows.raw: "Whether new characters should have autosave enabled by default or not. Can be disabled if you don't want to accidentally lose you main character's autosaves."

rows.original: Are you sure you want to return to the main menu?
rows.raw: "Are you sure you want to return to the main menu?"

rows.original: Any unsaved progress will be lost.
rows.translation: 所有未保存的进度将会丢失。

rows.original: Are you sure you want to exit the game?
rows.raw: "Are you sure you want to exit the game?"

rows.original: Any unsaved progress will be lost.
rows.translation: 所有未保存的进度将会丢失。

rows.original: Reset character options to their defaults.
rows.translation: 将角色设置恢复为默认值。

rows.original: Reset system options to their defaults.
rows.translation: 将系统设置恢复为默认值。

Could Not Restore Checkpoint

rows.original:
Critical Error
A critical error has occurred. Please create a bug report on the forums here. Please include what you did before the error and a screen-shot or copy-paste of the error message below: version:
rows.raw:
'
Critical Error
A critical error has occurred. Please create a bug report on the forums here. Please include what you did before the error and a screen-shot or copy-paste of the error message below: version: '

rows.translation: 从上一个检查点重新加载。

rows.original: There is no checkpoint available to reload from.
rows.translation: 没有可用来重新加载的检查点。
rows.raw: "There is no checkpoint available to reload from."

rows.original: Reload to right before you entered the dungeon.
rows.translation: 在进入地下城之前，请先重新加载到正确的状态。
rows.raw: "Reload to right before you entered the dungeon."

rows.original: You are not currently in a dungeon.
rows.translation: 你当前并不处于地下城中。
rows.raw: "You are not currently in a dungeon."

rows.original: Submit an error to our internal error reporting system. This will provide the error message to us automatically and allow us to better keep track of this issue!
rows.translation: 请将错误信息提交到我们的内部错误报告系统。这样系统会自动将错误信息发送给我们，帮助我们更好地追踪并解决这个问题。
rows.raw: "Submit an error to our internal error reporting system. This will provide the error message to us automatically and allow us to better keep track of this issue!"

rows.original: Your character will be referred to as male or female based on appearance scores.
rows.translation: 根据角色的外貌评分，系统会将其判定为男性或女性。
rows.raw: "Your character will be referred to as male or female based on appearance scores."

rows.original: Your character will be referred to as male where appropriate.
rows.translation: 在适当的情况下，你的角色将被视为男性。
rows.raw: "Your character will be referred to as male where appropriate."

rows.original: Your character will be referred to as female where appropriate.
rows.translation: 在适当的情况下，你的角色将被设定为女性。
rows.raw: "Your character will be referred to as female where appropriate."

rows.original: Disable your magical strapon. The piercing will remain, but you'll be as cock-less as if it were gone.
rows.raw: "Disable your magical strapon. The piercing will remain, but you'll be as cock-less as if it were gone."

rows.original: Enable your magical strapon. Time to deliver some down dickings!
rows.translation: 激活你的魔法棒吧，是时候大显身手了！
rows.raw: "Enable your magical strapon. Time to deliver some down dickings!"

rows.original: You have a real cock, so your magical strapon is no longer necessary.
rows.translation: 你的阴茎真的很粗大，所以你的那个魔法假阳具已经没有必要了。
rows.raw: "You have a real cock, so your magical strapon is no longer necessary."

rows.original: Disable your lactic studs. The piercings will remain, but you'll no longer have permanent lactation.
rows.raw: "Disable your lactic studs. The piercings will remain, but you'll no longer have permanent lactation."

rows.original: Enable your lactic studs. Time to be milky again!
rows.translation: 激活你的“乳汁分泌能力”，是时候再次变得“多产”了！
rows.raw: "Enable your lactic studs. Time to be milky again!"

rows.original: Disable your heat/rut navel stud. The piercing will remain, but you'll no longer be enhanced with a recurring heat/rut cycle.

rows.original:
Invalid attempt to iterate non-iterable instance.
In order to be iterable, non-array objects must have a [Symbol.iterator]() method.

curated.policy: Curated visible UI/configuration text from 103 core chunk. Keeps options UI, confirm popups, concise buttons/headings/descriptions; disables runtime errors, paths, CSS/classes, React internals, and code fragments.
